News

Britain Must Enforce Its Own Red Lines: Russia and the Shadow Fleet

Thursday, 30 April, 2026
As part of the Shadow Defence team, much of my work in Westminster is spent on defence and security. The shadow fleet is one of them, and it came back into sharp focus this month when the Government made a statement on North Atlantic submarine activity. The statement followed a period of heightened Russian naval presence off UK coastlines. I responded to it on behalf of the Official Opposition...
